SEARCH
Package piece

Class Piece

java.lang.Object
piece.Piece
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bishop, King, Knight, Pawn, Queen, Rook
public abstract class Piece extends Object
Represents a piece on the board or captured in the course of play.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final Color
    color
    The color representing the player to whom the piece belongs.
    protected Position
    position
    The current position of the piece.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Piece(Color color, Position position)
    Creates a new piece given color and initial position.

  • Field Details

    • position

      protected Position position
      The current position of the piece.

    • color

      protected final Color color
      The color representing the player to whom the piece belongs.

  • Constructor Details

    • Piece

      public Piece(Color color, Position position)
      Creates a new piece given color and initial position.

  • Method Details

    • getColor

      public Color getColor()
      Gets the color of the piece.
      Returns:
      The color.

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()
      Gets the current position of the piece.
      Returns:
      The current position.

    • getDirection

      protected int getDirection()
      Gets the hypothetical direction away from the side of the player who owns the piece.
      Returns:
      1 if the piece's color is black, -1 if it is white.

    • move

      public void move(Position position)
      Moves the piece to the given position.
      Parameters:
      position - The position to move to.

    • getPieceLetter

      public abstract String getPieceLetter()
      Returns a letter that represents the piece (e.g. 'K' for King).
      Returns:
      The letter.

    • getDisplayCode

      public String getDisplayCode()
      Returns a code that represents the piece (e.g. 'wK' for white King).
      Returns:
      The code.

    • possibleMoves

      public Collection<Position> possibleMoves(Board board)
      Returns all legal destination squares for this piece. Filters raw candidates down to moves that are within bounds, not occupied by a friendly piece, do not leave the moving side's king in check.
      Parameters:
      board - current board state
      Returns:
      collection of legal destination positions

    • candidateMoves

      protected abstract Collection<Position> candidateMoves(Board board)
      Gets the candidate moves for the piece, i.e. all possible positions it could move to geometrically, without accounting for check or pieces in the way.
      Returns:
      A collection of positions representing the destinations of the possible moves.
